{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Consultant Architects
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Consultant Architects]] are a group [[Calder]] intends to surrender himself to.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c2">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
